cards.name: Minas Morgul
cards.quote: Minas Morgul burns with a pale malice, and the road to it seems to remember fear.

cards.name: Luglurak
cards.quote: Luglurak crouches beneath the old shadow, waiting with the patience of iron.

cards.name: Kal Nargil
cards.quote: Kal Nargil grips the hills in black silence, where no bird lingers long.

cards.name: Tol Buruth
cards.quote: Tol Buruth drifts on the Sea of RhÃƒÂ»n like a rumor that has learned to sail.

cards.name: Lugarlur
cards.quote: Lugarlur crouches beneath the old shadow, waiting with the patience of iron.

cards.name: Durthang
cards.quote: Durthang clings to the Emyn Muil with a grim old patience, and its black height still dares the sky.

cards.name: Morannon
cards.quote: Morannon stands unyielding, a gate that has learned to answer only to ruin.

cards.name: Shelob's Lair
cards.quote: Shelob's Lair breathes with old malice, and even the stone seems to shy from the dark within it.

cards.name: Khazad-Dum
cards.quote: Khazad-Dum endures in buried majesty, and the dark below it still rings with memory.

cards.name: Erebor (Lost)
cards.quote: Erebor (Lost) keeps its noble outline even in ruin, like a crown left in ash.

cards.name: Goblin Gate
cards.quote: Goblin Gate gnaws at the pass like a broken fang, and the dark beyond it is never still.

cards.name: Barrow-downs
cards.quote: Luglurak crouches over Nurn like a black horn of the earth, and no light lingers long beside it.

cards.name: Gundabad
cards.quote: Gundabad bears the deep memory of the North, grim as a mountain scar that never closed.

cards.name: Doors of Night
cards.actionEffect: Grants Courage to all Dark Servants units for 1 turn and dispels Dawn.

cards.name: Full Moon
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Haste to all Nazgul for 1 turn.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked units.

cards.name: Secrets from a Lost Tome
cards.actionEffect: Reveal hidden artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 Mage for 1 turn.

cards.name: Struck by a Morgul Blade
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns) and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: AmonLhaw
cards.quote: AmonLhaw watches the vale with a stillness that can outlast kingdoms.

cards.name: AmonSul
cards.quote: AmonSul keeps its old crown of stone above the road, as if the North still owed it a watch.

cards.name: BaradWath
cards.quote: BaradWath stands like a dark sentinel over the waste, its shadow long with command.

cards.name: ButhOvaisa
cards.quote: ButhOvaisa lies far from easy roads, where the silence of the land feels deliberate.

cards.name: CamethBrin
cards.quote: CamethBrin cuts the horizon like a low dark crown, and the weather gathers there as if summoned.

cards.name: CarnDum
cards.quote: CarnDum stands hard against the North, and even its ruin looks carved for endurance.

cards.name: CirithUngol
cards.quote: CirithUngol is a soft place, and its softness is the first of its deceits.

cards.name: DeadMarshes
cards.quote: The reeds about DeadMarshes whisper like witnesses who would rather not be named.

cards.name: FennasDrunin
cards.quote: The reeds about FennasDrunin whisper like witnesses who would rather not be named.

cards.name: FornostErain
cards.quote: Across FornostErain, wind and distance move freely, as if the land itself were watching the march.

cards.name: Framsburg
cards.quote: Framsburg keeps its river-watch in the old Northman way, where ice and iron once shared a hearth.

cards.name: GladdenFields
cards.quote: At GladdenFields, the plain lies wide and unhidden, like a thought too large to keep to oneself.

cards.name: Goblin Gate
cards.quote: Goblin Gate bites at the pass with a feral hunger, and the mountain road shrinks beside it.

cards.name: Gondmaeglon
cards.quote: Gondmaeglon opens beneath the sky, and there is little there to soften the eye of war.

cards.name: JugRijeisha
cards.quote: JugRijeisha guards its own heat and dust, a place where the desert has learned to keep secrets.

cards.name: KhandAmu
cards.quote: KhandAmu drinks the sun and gives back only heat, dust, and hard intent.

cards.name: LagScara
cards.quote: LagScara lies under a restless sky, and the stillness there feels earned by threat.

cards.name: LagVrasfotak
cards.quote: LagVrasfotak watches from a barren reach, half-fortress and half-buried warning.

cards.name: Carach Angren
cards.quote: Carach Angren lies under a cruel name, and the stones there have not forgiven.

cards.name: MountDoom
cards.quote: MountDoom broods in fire and ash, as though the mountain itself had grown a bitter heart.

cards.name: MtGram
cards.quote: MtGram stands with a dwarf-fast stubbornness, as though the hill itself had taken a vow.

cards.name: Nurumurl
cards.quote: Nurumurl stands in a country that has taught itself to endure by never sleeping.

cards.name: Olbamarl
cards.quote: Olbamarl keeps its old hush by the water, and the reeds there seem to remember names.

cards.name: Ongushar
cards.quote: Ongushar is a thorn of a place, sharp enough to turn away easy hope.

cards.name: OrdugaAivaisa
cards.quote: OrdugaAivaisa feels like a watch-post left standing after the rest of a kingdom was taken away.

cards.name: Ostigurth
cards.quote: Ostigurth keeps its secrets in the stone, where even echoes seem cautious.

cards.name: Rul
cards.quote: Rul sits like a watchfire long gone cold, but the ground around it still knows watchfulness.

cards.name: SarnGoriwing
cards.quote: SarnGoriwing crouches beneath the forest edge, where tree-shadow and river-mist meet in secrecy.

cards.name: Thuringwathost
cards.quote: Thuringwathost bears the mark of old terror, and the land around it has not forgotten the touch.

cards.name: UrlurtsuNurn
cards.quote: UrlurtsuNurn endures in the heat with a rough and stubborn silence, like a camp that refused to die.

cards.name: Wathduin
cards.quote: Wathduin leans into the wind with a grim pride that refuses to be bent.

cards.name: Dragon-fire
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in radius 1 gain Burning (1 turn); enemies on forest tiles also gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: ElvesGoingWest
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all elves in radius 2.

cards.name: BorderPatrolling
cards.actionEffect: Reveal the surrounding area in a radius based on the higher of Agent or Commander skill, detect nearby enemies, and halt an enemy army commander in your hex if present.

cards.name: AshesOfGorgoroth
cards.actionEffect: Create a corruption pulse in radius 1-3 based on caster Mage: enemies gain Despair (1 turn), and allied evil characters remove Fear.

cards.name: A Knife in the Dark
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Poisoned (2 turns) and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: DreadOfTheNoldor
cards.actionEffect: Apply Despair (1 turn) to all Elf characters in radius 2, and apply Fear (1 turn) to enemy elves in the caster's hex.

cards.name: FiresOfDoom
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: apply Burning (1 turn) to all enemy units on wastelands tiles.

cards.name: Rain
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: remove Burning from all units, reduce movement in radius 2, and reduce visibility nearby.

cards.name: Twilight
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event: in radius 2, reduce visibility and clear scouting; allied dark-aligned PCs there become temporarily hidden.

cards.name: Flame of Udun
cards.actionEffect: In radius 2, apply Burning (1 turn) and Fear (1 turn) to all enemy units.

cards.name: The Blow of Gorgoroth
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: Scents of the Haradrim
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: deal moderate damage and apply Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: War spoils
cards.actionEffect: Gain 2 <sprite name="iron">, 1 <sprite name="steel">, and 1 <sprite name="leather">; choose 1 allied character in this hex to gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> or Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Mounts
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: Shadows of Ithilien
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Hidden (1 turn), and reveal enemies in radius 1 around the caster.

cards.name: Luglurak Dark Magic
cards.actionEffect: Enemy characters in radius 1 gain Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (3 turns).

cards.name: Marked by a Nazgul
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Fear (1 turn) and Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Orc Draught
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a small amount and gain Haste (1 turn).

cards.name: OrcRebellion
cards.actionEffect: Target allied army commander in your hex: gain +1 permanent Commander and lose 1 unit of the weakest army troop type.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.actionEffect: All naval or embarked units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted (1 turn).

cards.name: Hidden in Hides
cards.actionEffect: Enemy units in your hex are Halted (1 turn); caster gains Hidden (2 turns).

cards.name: Raid From The Mountains
cards.actionEffect: All allied army commanders in mountains or hills gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Courage <sprite name="encouraged"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Rallied Men
cards.actionEffect: Allied Human units gain Strengthened (1 turn).

cards.name: Empalisades
cards.actionEffect: If you are on an allied population center, increase its fortification by 1.

cards.name: Shielded
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified (1 turn), and if the target has Fear remove it.

cards.name: Sniped!
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy in same/adjacent hex: inflict small wound and Fear (1 turn).

cards.name: TheIronCrownRidesAgain
cards.actionEffect: Target allied Nazgul in your hex gains +1 Commander and +1 Mage.

cards.name: Chopping the Trees
cards.actionEffect: If you are on a forest hex, gain +3 timber; beast- or Ent-race characters here are moderately wounded.

cards.name: TheNineRideAgain
cards.actionEffect: All Nazgul gain Haste (3 turns).

cards.name: Traps
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in your hex: apply Blocked (1 turn) and Poisoned (2 turns).

cards.name: Well-equipped Army
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Fortified (1 turn).

cards.name: WhenThereIsAWhip
cards.actionEffect: All allied armies in radius 2 gain Haste (3 turns).

cards.name: Morgul Tithe
cards.actionEffect: Morgul Tithe. Unique event logic variant based on ReachOfBaradUngol.

cards.name: Black Gate Sortie
cards.actionEffect: Black Gate Sortie. Unique event logic variant based on RaidFromTheMountains.

cards.name: Shroud of Gorgoroth
cards.actionEffect: Shroud of Gorgoroth. Unique event logic variant based on DoorsOfNight.

cards.name: Sackville-Baggins Grudge
cards.quote: A good name may be guarded more fiercely than gold.
cards.actionEffect: All Hobbits in the hex are Blocked <sprite name="blocked"> for 1 turn.

cards.name: Uncautious Supper
cards.quote: A flame unwatched at meal may summon the long eye of night.
cards.actionEffect: At supper or rest, Hobbits in radius 2 lose Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> and take 15 damage.
